title: v89 — Stability & UX
description: Fixed BSOD crash on second spoof (removed kernel disk IRP hook that ran at wrong IRQL). After spoofing, app now auto-switches to Serials tab showing before/after values, then closes in 20 seconds.

title: v88 — MAC Spoof Removed
description: Removed MAC address spoofing which caused WAN Miniport Code 31 errors and WiFi disconnects on reboot. NIC ContainerID still spoofed. No more driver damage after restart.

title: v82 — License Backend Switch
description: Replaced Supabase license backend (paused on free tier) with Filemonk API. Keys from novasoftware.store now validate correctly. Dev keys still work offline.

title: v78 — Driver Rename
description: Renamed DirectIO64.sys to sysaux64.sys for stealth. Cleaned up stale sysaux64 service on load.
